name: python3-flask-socketio
title: python3-flask-socketio
description:
Socket.IO integration for Flask applications
Flask-SocketIO gives Flask applications access to low latency bi-directional
communications between the clients and the server. The client-side
application can use any of the SocketIO official clients libraries in
Javascript, C++, Java and Swift, or any compatible client to establish a
permanent connection to the server.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flask-socketio because Socket.IO integration for Flask applications.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flask-socketio as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flask-socketio with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flask-socketio --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
